entity: James Harden 2020-21 season totals across HOU+BKN trade (Regular): 44 GP, 1083 PTS

query_target.sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(gp) AS INTEGER) AS gp, CAST(SUM(total_pts) AS INTEGER) AS pts FROM agg_player_season WHERE player_id = 201935 AND season_year = '2020-21' AND season_type = 'Regular'

notes: KNOWN BUG (2026-07 data-quality audit): agg_player_season totals are inflated by a fan-out join over franchise name eras — analytics_player_game_complete holds one copy of every player-game per historical franchise name (Harden's BKN games exist as NJ/BKN/NYK, HOU games as SD/HOU), and the agg layer was built on top of it. Warehouse currently returns 48 GP / 3051 PTS for this season; fact_player_game_log (which is clean, verified vs BBR) gives the correct 44 / 1083. Flip to stable once the agg layer is rebuilt from fact_player_game_log. See docs/data-quality-audit.md. FIXED 2026-07 by the curated-layer rebuild (data/audit/rebuild_curated_layer.sql) + fact_game-based playoff derivation; flipped regression -> stable.
